smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/structural_alerts/test_aggregate.py -q -> 11 passed in 0.13s (core env, no box/GPU).

note: Union of PAINS/BRENK named matches (deduped by catalog+name; models+atoms merged) -> PAINS_count/BRENK_count + matched list + any_hit; ADMET-AI count shortcuts surfaced apart as cross_check and counted toward any_hit. Soft flag, never a gate.
